leadText: Withdraw redirects here. For the act of switching Pokémon in battle, see Recall. Withdraw (Japanese: からにこもる Withdraw into Shell) is a non-damaging Water-type move introduced in Generation I.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] Withdraw increases the user's Defense by one stage. If powered up by a Waterium Z into Z-Withdraw, the user's Defense stat rises by another stage. Withdraw can be used as the second move of a Pokémon Contest combination , with the user gaining 1 bonus appeal point if Rain Dance was used in the previous turn.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Stad Stad2 Used mainly by Pok é mon with shells. By withdrawing into the shell, Defense is increased. G S C Heightens the user's Defense . R S E Withdraws the body into its hard shell to raise Defense . FR LG The user withdraws its body in its hard shell, raising its Defense stat. Colo XD Withdraws into its hard shell to raise Defense . D P Pt HG SS PBR B W B2 W2 X Y OR AS S M US UM P E Sw Sh BD SP LA The user withdraws its body into its hard shell, raising its Defense stat. S V The user withdraws its body into its hard shell, boosting its Defense stat.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description MD R B Boosts the user's Defense by one level. MD T D S Boosts the user's Defense by 1 level. B S L じぶんの ぼうぎょを １だんかいあげる MD GtI It boosts your Defense. (The stat change returns to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.) S MD It boosts your Defense. The stat returns to normal when you go to the next floor or step on a Wonder Tile.
